general.name: Zscaler Firewall Rules
general.description: Config profile to configure firewall rules. Edit the inbound or outbound section in Content Filter to manage firewall rules
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>19DAF11A-966E-4BE4-A05D-CF72ACDF5AF6</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>19DAF11A-966E-4BE4-A05D-CF72ACDF5AF6</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Zscaler Firewall Rules</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Config profile to configure firewall rules. Edit the inbound or outbound section in Content Filter to manage firewall rules</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>FilterDataProviderBundleIdentifier</key><string>com.zscaler.zscaler.pktfilter</string><key>FilterDataProviderDesignatedRequirement</key><string>identifier: "com.zscaler.variable:zscaler.pktfilter" and anchor apple generic</string><key>FilterSockets</key><true/><key>FilterType</key><string>Plugin</string><key>Organization</key><string>Zscaler</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Web Content Filter Payload</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>8F585BA8-4137-4C78-B84A-689BFC32DC30</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.webcontent-filter</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>8F585BA8-4137-4C78-B84A-689BFC32DC30</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PluginBundleID</key><string>com.zscaler.zscaler</string><key>ServerAddress</key><string>zscaler.com</string><key>UserDefinedName</key><string>Zscaler Socket Filter System Extension</string></dict></array></dict></plist>
